title: Contacts
addDisabledPlaintext: Add a password to your wallet to save contacts
addDisabledLocked: Unlock your wallet to save contacts

plaintextHint.title: Contacts require a password-protected wallet
plaintextHint.body: Your wallet has no password, so contacts can't be saved — they're encrypted on this device and never stored in cleartext. Add a password to start saving contacts.

lockedHint.title: Wallet is locked
lockedHint.body: Unlock your wallet to view and save contacts. They're encrypted on this device and unavailable while locked.

empty.none: No contacts yet. Addresses you pay will appear here, ready to label.

editor.addressFixed: The address can't be changed for an existing contact.
editor.notesPlaceholder: Anything to remember about this contact…
editor.deleteConfirmPrompt: Remove this contact? This only deletes the local label, not any payments.

errors.invalidAddress: That does not look like a valid Botho address.
